arts.ttl: Connor Roberts misses out again as Burnley make three changes for Portsmouth clash
arts.sum: Scott Parker has made three changes to his Burnley side for today’s clash against Portsmouth.

arts.sum: Regan Poole is handed his first Pompey start in 10-and-a-half months for the trip to Burnley.

arts.sum: Pompey go in search of their maiden league win at Burnley today.

arts.ttl: ‘We are under no illusions’ - Burnley boss Scott Parker sends key warning his team ahead of Portsmouth clash
arts.sum: Portsmouth take on promotion hopefuls Burnley in a challenging away fixture

arts.sum: Burnley return to Turf Moor this afternoon looking to build on last week’s impressive win against Leeds United.

arts.sum: Pompey supporters head to Burnley today for their latest instalment of Championship football.

arts.ttl: Why Burnley boss Scott Parker isn't paying too much attention to Portsmouth's winless start
arts.sum: Scott Parker knows Burnley’s next opponents Portsmouth shouldn’t be underestimated despite their winless start to the season.

arts.ttl: ‘Fantastic business. Strange timing. Signings of the summer’ – how the Fratton faithful reacted to Portsmouth’s decision to reward key duo
arts.sum: Pompey fans on social media have been reacting to news that both John Mousinho and Rich Hughes have agreed extensions to their existing long-term Fratton Park contracts.

arts.sum: Scott Parker is happy for Hannibal to remain right “on the line” following his lively start to his Burnley career.

arts.sum: John Mousinho has acknowledged Owen Moxon faces a tough battle to force his way back into the Pompey starting XI.
